initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT st.translation
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
JOIN sets s ON c.uuid = s.code
JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE c.faceName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
  AND fd.language = 'Italian'
  AND st.language = 'Italian';

SELECT st.translation
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
JOIN sets s ON c.uuid = s.code
JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE c.faceName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
  AND fd.language = 'Italian'
  AND st.language = 'Italian';

SELECT st.translation
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
JOIN sets s ON c.uuid = s.code
JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE c.faceName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
  AND fd.language = 'Italian'
  AND st.language = 'Italian';

SELECT set_translations.translation
FROM cards
JOIN foreign_data ON cards.id = foreign_data.uuid
JOIN sets ON cards.id = sets.code
JOIN set_translations ON sets.code = set_translations.setCode
WHERE cards.faceName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
  AND foreign_data.language = 'Italian'
  AND set_translations.language = 'Italian';

SELECT st.translation
FROM cards c
JOIN foreign_data fd ON c.uuid = fd.uuid
JOIN sets s ON c.uuid = s.code
JOIN set_translations st ON s.code = st.setCode
WHERE c.faceName = 'Ancestor''s Chosen'
  AND fd.language = 'Italian'
  AND st.language = 'Italian';
